changes.summary: New BC-12 RedeemMagicLinkUseCase: delegates token validation/mark-used to AuthMagicLinkService.redeem, then authenticateSms/authenticateEmail + establishJwtSession. Documents inv-24 15m magic-link TTL vs SMS OTP 5m and Phase 7 /a vs /auth/link route consolidation. Exports createRedeemMagicLinkUseCase factory.
Documented BC-12 inv-24 persistence layer: createToken retains magicLink.ttlMinutes (default 15); redeem remains token-only and is consumed by RedeemMagicLinkUseCase for session orchestration.

notes: AuthController wiring to RedeemMagicLinkUseCase is outside write_set (follow-up). Rate limiting and redirect URLs remain transport-layer concerns in the controller. Web route consolidation (/a/[token] canonical, /auth/link/[token] legacy proxy) is Phase 7; both already proxy to GET /api/v1/auth/link/:token.
